examples: Three day's vacation should depressurize me.
Should a valve need repair, depressurize and drain the system on all sides of the valve.
The silver metal device on the right side of this Centura machine is a batch loader, used to quickly depressurize a stack of wafers prior to feeding them into the machine for processing.
Oxygen masks were not deployed, indicating that the cabin did not depressurize, the bureau said in a 2009 report.
The walk began about half an hour late because it took longer than expected to depressurize the new airlock so the astronauts could step out into space.
